name: Nami (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] You may return 1 or more DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck: Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
